meaning: n.玛祖卡舞(波兰一种节奏轻快的舞蹈),玛祖卡舞曲
examples: Polka mazurka champetre, Op. 239, Wo klingen die Lieder.
The first 26 preludes almost have all his types, such as etude, mazurka, notturno etc,.
They are popular for their wide range of different musical pieces: from traditional chorals to Marches, Polka and Mazurka.
